a206_closure_decision.decision: A206 scheduler functionality is closed independently from A209 long-duration soak.
a206_closure_decision.rationale: Lease, auto wake, idempotency, heartbeat, retry cap, dead-letter, graceful shutdown, transactional outbox dispatch, Docker Compose worker binding and worker supervisor execution are implemented and CI validated. 24h soak remains an A209 production-stability gate.

implemented_scope: PostgreSQL background_jobs table with job_type + idempotency_key uniqueness.
background_job_attempts table records each lease attempt, heartbeat, release, failure, expiry and success.
dead_letter_jobs table captures terminal failure payload and final attempt metadata.
transactional_outbox table captures durable refresh events with idempotency, lease, retry and dispatch state.
scripts/job_scheduler.py supports enqueue, lease, heartbeat, graceful release, retry, expired lease recovery, completion and dead-letter transitions.
scripts/job_scheduler.py supports dispatch-outbox-once for pending outbox events and logs dispatch_outbox_event operations.
POST /v1/scoring/recompute enqueues score_recompute jobs into background_jobs with task/acceptance metadata and an active-context idempotency key.

scripts/job_scheduler.py registers a score_recompute handler that validates active-context freshness, writes scoring_runs and score_results for relationship_fact_candidate, relationship, entity, event, industry and source_document object families, advances refresh_token and completes stale jobs as skipped_stale_context instead of retrying forever.
POST /v1/data/snapshots/refresh enqueues data_snapshot_refresh jobs into background_jobs with task/acceptance metadata and an active-context idempotency key.

scripts/job_scheduler.py registers a data_snapshot_refresh handler that validates active-context freshness, writes active data_snapshots, advances refresh_token, emits data.snapshot.activated and completes stale jobs as skipped_stale_context instead of retrying forever.

scripts/job_scheduler.py registers a curated_ingestion_refresh handler that reuses the curated official NVIDIA/ASML loader idempotently, records execute_curated_ingestion_refresh and emits data.ingestion.completed.
scripts/fetch_official_source_full_text.py records dry-run source_health, retry_policy, attempt metadata and dead_letter_after_attempts=3 for official-source parser plumbing without live retrieval.
POST /v1/calibrations/run creates a calibration_run background job and calibration.run.requested outbox event while preserving the 14-day cadence and no-auto-activation policy.

scripts/job_scheduler.py registers a calibration_run handler that computes relationship-fact coverage, score-result coverage and drift warnings, writes calibration_runs metrics/drift_report/proposal_status=none, records execute_calibration_run and emits calibration.run.completed.

apps/worker/app/main.py exposes the supervised worker CLI with health, once and supervise commands, covering expired lease recovery, bounded job execution, transactional outbox dispatch, idle stop and SIGTERM/SIGINT graceful stop.
Makefile exposes worker-health, worker-once and worker-supervise operator commands for deployment wiring.
docker-compose.yml binds postgres, migrate and worker services under the worker profile so the default MVP worker process manager can start after healthy PostgreSQL and successful migrations.
infra/docker/worker.Dockerfile builds the worker/migration runtime and runs apps.worker.app.main supervise by default.
scripts/validate_worker_deployment.py validates the Docker Compose worker process binding and writes a release evidence artifact.

tests/integration/test_database_migrations.py exercises scheduler idempotency, bounded retry, dead-letter, heartbeat, graceful shutdown release, expired lease auto-requeue, success completion, score_recompute enqueue/execution idempotency, data_snapshot_refresh enqueue/execution idempotency, curated_ingestion_refresh execution and worker supervisor health/once/idle-stop contracts.

latest_score_recompute_ci_result.verified_scope: scheduler score_recompute execution persists all MVP object-family score_results and emits score.snapshot.activated

local_validation: .venv/bin/ruff check apps/api/app/scoring.py apps/api/app/domain_repository.py apps/worker/app/main.py scripts/job_scheduler.py scripts/validate_worker_deployment.py tests/integration/test_database_migrations.py tests/unit/test_scoring.py
remaining_gaps_after_a206_done: Run T1307 24h operator soak using the Docker Compose worker binding for long-duration timer, retry and recovery stability.
Keep A209 IN PROGRESS until committed 24h operator evidence is validated by CI.
Keep A210 formal brand/legal/market clearance blocking public launch.
remote_validation_required: GitHub Actions make verify-g2-db must run migrations, schema checks and PostgreSQL integration tests.
rollback: Run docker compose --profile worker stop worker.
Revert docker-compose.yml worker/migrate services and infra/docker/worker.Dockerfile.
Run scripts/migrate.py downgrade --steps 1 to drop dead_letter_jobs, background_job_attempts and background_jobs.
Remove scripts/job_scheduler.py and A206 traceability/evidence rows.
Regenerate release artifacts and rerun make verify-g2-db.

system.subtitle: 企业商业版图与供应链递归探索系统
